raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California Public Utilities Commission (CPUC) has the power to increase a fixed charge on electrical bills at any time under current law.",
    "Senate Bill 1326 aimed to repeal provisions of Assembly Bill 205 that mandated an income-based fixed charge for customers of Investor-Owned Utilities (IOUs).",
    "Senate Bill 1326 had an urgency clause that would allow it to take effect immediately upon being signed into law.",
    "The CPUC recently approved a $24.15 per month fixed charge coupled with a reduction in usage rates for electrical bills.",
    "The fixed charge approved by the CPUC is deemed excessive by Leader Jones, especially considering its uncapped nature."
  ]
}
```
